summary: Verified zotero-cli-cc v0.7.0 installs cleanly via uv tool install on NixOS; live smoke-tested against real Zotero library (880 items, 870 PDFs); confirmed all critical criteria including offline SQLite reads, stable JSON envelope, PDF page extraction, and child attachment support via zot attach. Produced self-contained recommendation document with comparison matrix, installation guide, command quick reference, and child attachment criterion assessment.

artifacts.summary: Final recommendation document: zotero-cli-cc as primary backend. Includes 25-criterion comparison matrix, recommended architecture, NixOS installation guide (uv + ZOT_DATA_DIR env var), API key setup, command quick reference, verified smoke test results, child attachment criterion assessment, and what-to-build-next guidance.
